items.title: The Hallucination Snowball: Modeling Error Propagation as State Transitions in Multi-Agent LLM Pipelines
items.description: This paper formalizes the hallucination snowball effect, demonstrating how errors in multi-agent LLM pipelines transform from checkable facts into unrecoverable narratives. By modeling this propagation as a first-order Markov process, the research proves that implementing boundary gates at agent handoffs reduces hallucination survival from 58.4% to 16.2%. This work provides the first mathematical framework for propagation control, offering a scalable strategy to ensure reliability in high-stakes, sequential AI architectures.

items.title: PuMV: Punjabi Multimodal Visual Reasoning Benchmark
items.description: Engineered PuMVR, a first-of-its-kind multimodal benchmark for quantifying orthographic bias in VLMs across Gurmukhi, Shahmukhi, and Roman scripts. I developed automated evaluation pipelines to audit 10 state-of-the-art models on NVIDIA GH200 infrastructure and architected the Script Consistency Rate (SCR) metric to rigorously measure cross-script reasoning robustness.

items.title: Salish Sea Digital Twin - Marine Habitat & Energy Simulation (RediMinds)
items.description: Engineered a high-fidelity digital twin using Unreal Engine, integrating YOLOv8 for species classification and Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) to achieve 97% accuracy in ocean hydrology prediction. I architected the end-to-end deployment on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and built real-time data pipelines for NOAA telemetry, synchronizing environmental metrics with complex 3D visualizations of EMF and hydrodynamic flowlines.

items.title: IPOSGPT LLM - Multi-Agent RAG for Global Ocean Policy (RediMinds)
items.description: Architected the GCP infrastructure and PostgreSQL schema to efficiently manage and index a high-scale repository of over 800,000 documents. Developed automated ETL pipelines for data extraction and vector embedding, and engineered a multi-agent framework to handle real-time news retrieval and performance evaluation. This technical foundation ensured a 0% hallucination rate, delivering a robust, evidence-grounded backend for national-level policy decisions.

items.title: Multi-Agent Medical RAG - High-Precision Clinical Evidence Retrieval (RediMinds)
items.description: Architected a production-grade Medical RAG system integrating 70,000+ clinical documents and guidelines with sub-second retrieval latency. I optimized the engine using 16-bit vector precision scaling and a multi-tier indexing strategy (HNSW, GIN, B-Tree) to enable high-performance semantic search across diverse medical datasets. To ensure clinical safety, I developed a multi-agent evaluation framework with a dedicated Reference Checker agent that eliminated hallucinations and achieved 100% citation accuracy for automated insurance reviews.

items.title: Genius AI SaaS Platform
items.description: Genius AI is a unified SaaS platform that integrates text, code, image, video, and music generation into a single, seamless web application. By orchestrating advanced AI models through a user-centric interface, it eliminates workflow fragmentation and empowers non-technical creators to significantly accelerate high-quality multimedia production.

items.title: AI Digital Twin Platform
items.description: Engineered an end-to-end multimodal digital twin pipeline integrating fine-tuned autoregressive language models (GPT-2) with synchronized neural text-to-speech and dynamic video lip-syncing. This architecture achieves high-fidelity persona replication, establishing a robust and scalable framework for real-time, interactive human-AI avatar deployment.

items.title: MNPJ Creations - E-Commerce Platform
items.description: MNPJ Creations is a robust, full-stack e-commerce platform engineered with Django, featuring secure user authentication, dynamic product cataloging, and a comprehensive administrative dashboard for inventory and order management. By integrating live PayPal payment processing alongside localized checkout options, the system ensures a frictionless, secure, and accessible transaction experience. This project demonstrates end-to-end web architecture proficiency, successfully delivering a scalable digital storefront that serves both consumer workflows and backend administrative needs.
